deepseek-v4-flash.label: DeepSeek V4 Flash
deepseek-v4-flash.description: DeepSeek-V4 fast model. No thinking mode — safe for multi-turn Paperclip agents.

deepseek-v4-pro.label: DeepSeek V4 Pro (thinking — single-turn only)
deepseek-v4-pro.description: DeepSeek-V4 production model. Uses thinking mode and emits reasoning_content. Multi-turn use requires the adapter to echo reasoning_content back on every turn — opencode_local does NOT do this. Use only for single-turn tasks or when your adapter handles reasoning_content passback.

deepseek-reasoner.label: DeepSeek Reasoner (thinking — single-turn only)
deepseek-reasoner.description: DeepSeek R1 reasoning model. Same reasoning_content constraint as deepseek-v4-pro. Use max_tokens >= 500.
